scripts.build: next build && { cp -f node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs out/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'note: bundled pdfjs worker not found; out/ keeps the committed public/ copy'; }
scripts.deploy:s3: bash -c 'set -aeuo pipefail && source .env && : "${S3_BUCKET:?set S3_BUCKET in .env}" && [ -f out/index.html ] && aws s3 sync out/ "s3://$S3_BUCKET" --delete'
scripts.invalidate: bash -c 'set -aeuo pipefail && source .env && : "${CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID:?set CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID in .env}" && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id "$CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID" --paths "/*"'
scripts.send-it: pnpm build && pnpm deploy:s3 && pnpm invalidate
